contact.title: Let's
contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your idea into reality? Get in touch and let's build something amazing together.

info.title: Get in
info.description: I am always available to discuss new projects, partnerships, or simply exchange ideas about technology. Choose the most convenient way for you.

form.name: Name *
form.subject: Subject *
form.subjectPlaceholder: What would you like to discuss?
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or idea...
form.guarantee: Response guaranteed within 24 hours. Your data is protected.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMax: Name must be less than 100 characters
validation.emailMax: Email must be less than 100 characters
validation.phoneMax: Phone must be less than 30 characters
validation.subjectMax: Subject must be less than 200 characters
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters
validation.messageMax: Message must be less than 5000 characters

toast.successDescription: I'll get in touch soon. Thank you!
